Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Uses a double-tap to the glabella as a practical shortcut for Spirit Vision
Old Neil.accessories: silver chain with a moonstone pendulum, gold pocket watch
Old Neil.source_notes: Chapter 40 provides a specific description of his eye color as 'slightly turbid dark red' and confirms his use of a silver chain moonstone pendulum and a gold pocket watch.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: deep dark brown, appearing pitch black like the night
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, matching brown coat, round felt hat, old leather shoes
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, brown eyes, dressed in a sharp black tuxedo and silk top hat, carrying a plain cane.
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Ability to see auras (Spirit Vision) by tapping his glabella twice
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch kept in tuxedo inner lining, black cane
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Old Neil confirms Klein's role/sequence as a 'Seer' multiple times during the mysticism curriculum.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Appearance explicitly described in the chapter text when Klein meets her in the finance office.

Dunn Smith.eye_color: deep gray (appearing abnormally deep in darkness)
Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: black trench coat and a halved black top hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Confirmed his use of a specific pen and reinforced his established character trait of forgetfulness.

Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with a romantic temperament, deep green eyes, faint smile
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: young adult male, slightly messy black hair, deep green eyes, wearing an untucked white shirt and tight trousers, romantic poet temperament
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions his green eyes while he is doubting Klein.

Bredt.primary_clothing: Black top hat, charcoal grey Victorian civilian suit, white shirt, and a dark cravat
Bredt.face_description: A mature and friendly face defined by a thick, bushy black beard and slightly weathered features.
Bredt.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, thick black beard, wearing a black top hat and a charcoal Victorian civilian suit.
Bredt.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, snow white, dark brown
Bredt.source_notes: Identified as a middle-aged civilian staff member with a thick black beard and top hat; celebrating his 15th wedding anniversary.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Text describes her as 'brown-haired' and mentions her changing into a cream-colored dress the next morning.

Cesare Francis.primary_clothing: dark brown Victorian coachman's coat, flat cap, heavy boots
Cesare Francis.face_description: Weather-beaten face with a thick neck and a sturdy jawline. Professional and unassuming expression.
Cesare Francis.visual_anchor: mid-40s male, medium skin, short brown hair, wearing a dark brown Victorian coachman's coat and flat cap, holding carriage reins
Cesare Francis.color_palette: dark brown, charcoal grey, earthy tan
Cesare Francis.source_notes: Identified as the carriage driver for the company; appearance and age guessed based on profession.

Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: Dress with frilly designs along the sleeves
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Has now consumed the Spectator potion, becoming a Sequence 9 Beyonder.
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Text describes her as 'tall, blond' and shows her successfully concocting and drinking the Spectator potion.

Susie.face_description: Friendly and remarkably intelligent golden retriever face, featuring a soft muzzle and expressive, bright eyes.
Susie.visual_anchor: Intelligent golden retriever dog with lustrous golden fur and bright brown eyes, often sitting with an air of capable assistance.
Susie.color_palette: golden yellow, warm brown, creamy white
Susie.distinguishing_features: Accidentally consumed the Spectator potion, becoming a Sequence 9 Beyonder dog.
Susie.source_notes: Text confirms she licked up the silver Spectator potion from a shattered cup.

Annie.primary_clothing: Traditional black Victorian maidservant dress with a crisp white apron and cap
Annie.face_description: Efficient and professional expression, tidy features, and a disciplined posture.
Annie.visual_anchor: Mid-30s female, fair skin, brown hair in a neat bun, wearing a black Victorian maidservant dress with a white apron.
Annie.source_notes: Audrey's maidservant; age and hair color inferred from her senior role.

Duchess Della.primary_clothing: Luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown with black lace trim and a wide-brimmed feathered hat.
Duchess Della.face_description: Elegant and refined features, high cheekbones, thin arching brows, and a poised, aristocratic air.
Duchess Della.visual_anchor: early 40s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in an updo, wearing a luxurious emerald green silk Victorian gown and a feathered hat
Duchess Della.source_notes: Mentioned as Duke Negan's wife; appearance and age guessed based on status.

Madam Vivi.primary_clothing: Crisp white baker's apron over a simple grey Victorian dress, sleeves rolled up.
Madam Vivi.face_description: Warm, round face with gentle wrinkles around the eyes and a capable, professional expression.
Madam Vivi.visual_anchor: 50s female, fair skin, salt and pepper hair in a bun, wearing a white baker's apron over a grey Victorian dress
Madam Vivi.color_palette: stark white, slate grey, flour dust beige
Madam Vivi.source_notes: Mentioned as a palace baker; appearance and age guessed based on profession.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a stoic and solemn expression.
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Hexagonal crystal-like snowflake absorbed into his palm
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Text describes his 'rough face' and confirms him as the captain of the Blue Avenger.

Sainz.primary_clothing: Dark blue robe embroidered with silver lightning patterns, typical of the Church of Storms.
Sainz.face_description: Clean-cut features with a determined brow and sharp blue eyes that suggest religious fervor.
Sainz.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, pale skin, short blond hair, wearing a dark blue robe with silver lightning patterns, right fist clenched against his chest in salute
Sainz.distinguishing_features: Lightning pattern embroidery on his robes.
Sainz.source_notes: Appearance (blond, lightning robe) and name confirmed in text; eyes and age guessed based on faction.
